playbook.intent: Identified delivery bottleneck to contractor sourced, signed, onboarded, and shipping billable work in week 3.
playbook.scope: Identify a recurring delivery bottleneck, scope a contractor role, source 5-10 candidates, pick one, sign a contractor agreement, and run them through onboarding so they ship billable work in week 3. Exit artifact: contractor producing acceptable client-facing output with a 30-60-90 plan and clear escalation path.

success-criteria.criterion: Documented role brief with deliverables + escalation path
Signed contractor agreement on file (IP + NDA terms locked)
Contractor shipping billable client work by week 3

stage.name: Define the role
stage.intent: Specify the bottleneck and the deliverable shape, not a vague 'helper' role.

tasks.task: Map process bottleneck producing the need
List 3-5 concrete deliverables for the role

stage.decision-gate: Advance once a stranger could read the role brief and describe the daily work.

stage.name: Source + screen
stage.intent: Get 5-10 plausible candidates into the funnel quickly.

tasks.task: Post role in 3 channels (network, niche board, referrals)

stage.decision-gate: Advance when shortlist has 3+ candidates above the bar.

stage.name: Audition
stage.intent: Paid trial that mirrors actual work; written feedback per candidate.
stage.decision-gate: Hire if rubric score above threshold AND finalist comms feel low-friction.

stage.name: Contract + comply
stage.intent: Paper everything before the first task; misclassification kills agencies.

tasks.task: Sign contractor agreement with IP + NDA + termination clauses
Register tax IDs / W-9 / VAT equivalents

stage.decision-gate: No work begins until all paperwork cleared.

stage.name: Onboard + ship

tasks.task: Deliver 30-60-90 plan + access kit on day 1
Pair on first deliverable in week 1
Hand contractor an independent client task by week 3

stage.decision-gate: Required output: contractor ships acceptable client-facing work by week 3 OR documented re-trial / release.

extra.value: [W-2 employee hires - this is contractor-only, Founding-team co-founder search - distinct playbook]
[At least one recurring engagement type the contractor can absorb, Bank + invoicing system set up for contractor payments]

[Hiring on 'gut' without a paid audition - fixes the wrong problem, Skipping the contractor-vs-employee classification check - regulators do not forgive ignorance, Onboarding by Slack DM - no documented 30-60-90 = no clear ramp]
['Did the paid audition simulate actual client work?', 'Is the paperwork done before any client-facing task?', 'Does the contractor have a written 30-60-90 plan they can self-check?']

{human: faion get-content hire-and-onboard-a-new-contractor --format md, agent: faion get-content hire-and-onboard-a-new-contractor --format context, json: faion get-content hire-and-onboard-a-new-contractor --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P5 micro-agency founder persona}]
